topComments.text: Hallo zusammen, vielen Dank für die Aufnahme und die nette Begrüßung. Ich selbst bin Filmschaffender und hin und wieder auf der Suche nach  spannenden kleinen Projekten zum mitmachen, unterstützen oder leiten. Aber auch für eigene Filmstoffe suche ich hin und wieder nach engagierten Mitstreitern,  egal ob Crew oder Cast. Ich bin mit meiner Produktionsfirma Quantling-Media seit letzten Jahres in Mitteldeutschland angesiedelt. Ich freue mich, den einen oder anderen von euch kennenzulernen und auf gemeinsame Projekte, wenn es klappt.

items.text:
**PILNY CASTING!!! - ROLA DZIECIĘCA**

Bardzo pilnie, do zamkniętego serialu kryminalnego dla jednej z platform, poszukuję **CHŁOPCA w** **wieku 6-10 lat.**

Zdjęcia odbędą się w Warszawie. 

Rozpoczynają się w połowie lipca i potrwają do października 2026. 

Rola chłopca to ok. 10 dni zdjęciowych.

**Chłopiec to zapalony kibic, pełen energii łobuziak,  wysportowany i lubiący grać w piłkę nożną. **

**W zgłoszeniu bardzo proszę o przesłanie poniższych krótkich materiałów filmowych: **

1. Krótkiej wizytówki dziecka - imię nazwisko, wiek i krótką wypowiedź o swoich zainteresowaniach np. sport, gry itp.

2. Krótkie, spontaniczne nagranie kibicowskich przyśpiewek lub dopingu ulubionej drużyny piłkarskiej piłkarskiej.

Zgłoszenie proszę wysyłać poprzez formularz:

https://form.jotform.com/261513807079056

**ZGŁOSZENIA PROSIMY PRZESYŁAĆ D0 7 CZERWCA.**

**EWENTUALNE ZDJĘCIA PRÓBNE ODBĘDĄ SIĘ 13-14 CZERWCA W WARSZAWIE.**

sharedPost.text:
POSZUKIWANI STATYŚCI: 
Seniorzy z charakterem (80+) 

Do wyjątkowej artystycznej sesji zdjęciowej  operatora nominowanego do Oscara poszukujemy osób w wieku 80 lat i więcej (rocznik 1930 - 1940)
Szukamy twarzy z historią – autentycznych, naturalnych i zbalansowanych życiowym doświadczeniem. Interesuje nas czyste, prawdziwe piękno dojrzałego wieku, dlatego szukamy osób, które wyglądają naturalnie na swój wiek.
Twarze naturalne, z widocznymi zmarszczkami i unikalnym wyrazem (bez zabiegów medycyny estetycznej zmieniających rysy twarzy)

Masz w rodzinie babcię, dziadka, ciocię lub sąsiada, którzy idealnie pasują do tego opisu? A może to właśnie Ty chcesz wziąć udział w tym projekcie? Pokażmy razem piękno dojrzałości!

📩 **JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?**
Wyślij zgłoszenie na adres e-mail: 
impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com
wpisując w tytule SENIOR

- Imię, nazwisko oraz wiek.
- Aktualne, wyraźne zdjęcie twarzy (w naturalnym świetle, bez filtrów!) 
- Numer telefonu do kontaktu

Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami.

items.text:
CASTING CALL 'Sugarcoat'

Student film in association with The University of Edinburgh

Edinburgh-based actors ideal

A sister and a brother travelling back from their father’s funeral together stop for a picnic at a motorway services. The sister reflects on a stream of conflicting memories of her father.

Roles: 

sister (age: 25-35)

brother (age: 35-45)

father (age: 50-65)

Filming dates: June 21st-25th and possibly 13th-14th

CONTACT: s2565300@ed.ac.uk

THE SISTER REFLECTS ON A STREAM OF CONFLICTING MEMORIES OF HER FATHER. ROLES SISTER FEMALE, AGE 25-35 BROTHER- MALE, AGE 35-45 MAIN CHARACTER YOUNGER SIBLING, SUCCESSFUL AND SELF-ASSURED OLDER SIBLING, LOST SPIRIT WHO IS PROFESSIONALLY UNSATISFIED FATHER MALE, AGE 50-65 SECONDARY CHARACTER INFLUENTIAL, SELF-DESTRUCTIVE FIGURE IN HIS CHILDREN'S LIVES *ACTORS *ACTORSARENOTREQUIREDTOBERELATED NOT REQUIRED"

CASTING CALL — WICKED FRIDAYS 

NOC Theatre is seeking Black performers for the theatre production, Wicked Fridays, a dark psychological thriller exploring isolation, desire, survival, and the stories we tell ourselves to endure.

We're currently casting:

LEILANI (Female, 25–30) — British-Caribbean
ARIEL (Male, 18–22) — Caribbean accent required

 London
 Paid
 Auditions: 22–24 June
 Rehearsals: August
 Performances: October

To apply, send your:
• Headshot
• CV
• Spotlight Link (if applicable)

Email: noctheatrecompany@gmail.com

If you're drawn to psychologically intense storytelling, layered characters, and atmospheric theatre, we'd love to hear from you.

#CastingCall #BlackActors #BlackPerformers #TheatreCasting #LondonTheatre #ActorsUK #BritishTheatre #CaribbeanActors #StageActors #Auditions #PaidActingJob #WickedFridays

I am primarily looking opportunities; however, I am also open to collaborating on high-quality photo shoots that can enhance my portfolio and involve experienced professionals.

Please feel free to contact me if you believe we could be a good match for a project.

items.text:
You are in for a grandma-granddaughter, human-organ-smuggling-to-Poland road trip of a lifetime. But in order to film it, we have to rent the car, pay the gran, buy food and, and, and… well, all of that requires money. And technology too.

We are a team of women creatives making **OH, GRAN! ("НУ, БА!")**, a darkly funny road-trip film set in the 1990s.

Sasha, a troubled woman tangled in organized crime, is tasked with smuggling a cooler of human organs from Ukraine to Poland. Her unpredictable grandmother unexpectedly joins the journey, turning the trip into something neither of them expects.

We're currently competing for funding through Decentralized Pictures and would love your support.

**How to help:**
1. Open Chrome on your laptop.
2. Visit: https://app.decentralized.pictures/.../6a11e333fde507ae32...
3. Find **OH, GRAN! ("НУ, БА!")** in the Filmmakers Assistance Grant.
4. Vote and leave a review.
5. Share with anyone who supports independent cinema.

If you're a filmmaker, Decentralized Pictures is also a great resource for discovering film funding opportunities.

[[https://tenor.com/view/thelma-and-louise-vintage-girl-power-we-can-do-it-to-the-end-gif-12184359](https://tenor.com/view/thelma-and-louise-vintage-girl-power-we-can-do-it-to-the-end-gif-12184359)](https://tenor.com/view/thelma-and-louise-vintage-girl-power-we-can-do-it-to-the-end-gif-12184359)

The preparations for the Christmas Circus Gera 2026/2027 are already underway, and we are looking for talented artists from around the world to join our international production!

We are currently seeking:
✨ Floor Acts
✨ 2–3 Strong Acts
✨ Duos and Groups Preferred

If you have an outstanding act and would like to perform in one of Germany’s most magical Christmas circus productions, we would love to hear from you!

• Videos of your act(s)
• Photos
• Technical requirements
• Available dates for the 2026/2027 season

Become part of an unforgettable Christmas experience and inspire thousands of visitors with your talent!

Where the magic of Christmas comes alive. ✨

items.text:
## 📣 CASTING CALL: NON-UNION TALENT (LOS ANGELES/LONG BEACH AREA) 📣

**PROJECT:** GardaWorld - ECAM + GWS _ B-roll Content Shoot 

**ROLE:** GWS Agent (General) 

**UNION STATUS:** Non-Union 

**RATE:** Paid, Full Image Buyout

## 👤 PROFILE SOUGHT 
* **Quantity:** 1 Talent
* **Age/Look:** Young, multiethnic, fit, and confident (mid-30s-mid-40s would be ideal
* **Character Note:** No smiling (stern/professional demeanour).
* **Wardrobe:** Will require a full uniform and an Ambassador badge (provided on set).

## 📅** SHOOT DETAILS**
* **Date:** Monday, June 15, 2026
* **Location:** Near Long Beach Airport (LGB), CA
* *Local hires only (no travel or accommodation provided).*

## 📩 HOW TO APPLY

If you are available and fit the description, please submit by email to: **andreanne.fc@noba.com by Friday, June 5.**

**Subject Line:** GWS Agent - [Your Name]

**Please include:**
1. Full-length body photos (recent, clear lighting, no filters).
2. Your current measurements/sizes.
3. Your contact information.

🚫 **NO DMs PLEASE.** Direct messages on Facebook will not be reviewed. 
⚠️ *Due to the volume of submissions, only pre-selected candidates will be contacted.*

Thank you! 🙏

topComments.text: Andréanne Fluet-Chabot where's the love to the thickens hahahaha

📅 Termin realizacji: 5.06
📍 Lokalizacja: Warszawa - Bemowo
💰 Stawka: 150 zł

https://tiny.pl/sxs_1s55w

lub

W treści maila prosimy o przesłanie:
✅ imienia i nazwiska
✅ wieku

✅ zdjęcia portretowego
✅ zdjęcia sylwetki

items.text:
SANTA CASTING CALL - Christmas at Bewl Water 2026
Do you have what it takes to bring the magic of Christmas to life? Christmas at Bewl Water is looking for talented, warm and engaging performers to portray Santa within one of the South East's most magical family Christmas experiences.

Set within beautiful woodland beside Bewl Water, our immersive festive adventure welcomes thousands of families each year. Through storytelling, character meet and greets and unforgettable Christmas magic, our performers help create memories that last a lifetime.

The Role

As Santa, you will be at the heart of the experience, meeting families throughout the day and creating authentic, magical interactions with children and their loved ones. We're looking for performers who can embody the warmth, kindness and wonder of the character while remaining fully immersed in the story world.

We're Looking For

• Strong performers with excellent improvisation and audience engagement skills

• Confident communicators who enjoy interacting with children and families

• Warm, patient and charismatic personalities

• Previous performance, entertainment or Santa experience is welcomed but not essential

📍 Location: Bewl Water, Kent

📅 Auditions: 15th & 22nd June 2026

🎄 Performance Dates: Late November – 24th December 2026

💼 Paid Freelance Contract

Requirements

• Aged 18+

• Right to work in the UK

• DBS check (or willingness to obtain one)

• Full availability across rehearsals and performance dates

To apply, please send your CV, headshot and showreel/improvised video to:

chloe.gifford@bewlwater.co.uk

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of tree and text that says 'Christimasa! BewlWaler SANTA CASTING CALL 2026 Join a large-scale immersive Christmas experience for families, filled with live performance storytelling & festive magic. We're looking for talented performers to portray Santa in our immersive family Christmas experience. Bewl Water, Lamberhurst, Kent 17 Auditions: 15th & 22nd June 2026 Performances: Nov Dec 2026 Paid (Freelance) To apply, send the following to chloe. hloe.giffiord@bewlwater.co.uk CV Recent Headshot Showreel and/or improvised audition video christmas.bewlwater.co.uk'

sharedPost.text:
@everyone

Crew Call Out
Location: Chester 
Volunteers - 0 Budget Film 
Dates - June - 10th, 11th, 12th, 13th

Looking to build experience in the film industry? 
We are looking for volunteers based near Chester to help out on a 0 budget passion project feature film - NEST Project 

Please send your CV, where your based and a small description of what department you would like to volunteer in and your availability to info@emberproduction.com

Any level/experience is welcome! 

Note applicants must be able to drive as set is remote. 

Check out our Facebook page to learn more about the project!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'INFO@EMBERPRODUCTION.COM GREW NEEDED! UK BASED VOLUNTEER PROJECT N.E.S.T. PROJECT MAKE MAKEUP UP ARTISTS COSTUME DESIGNERS PRODUCTION DESIGNERS IXI MT JOIN JOINANONGOINGPRODUCTION: AN ONGOING PRODUCTION: WORK AFIL SET LEARN NEW SKILLS BE PART GROWING COMMUNITY ANYEXPERIENCE WELCOME GET IN TOUCH TO SEE HOW YOU CAN BE PART OF N.E.S.T PROJECT'

sharedPost.text:
@everyone

CANNIBALS WANTED!

Exciting news, everyone!

We’re looking for volunteers to join us for one of the biggest and most atmospheric sequences in The Eight Saga: N.E.S.T. Project , our Cannibal Camp scenes filming in Chester on the 10th, 11th, 12th, and 13th of June.

Whether you’re an actor, filmmaker, creative, or simply someone who wants to be part of an ambitious independent feature film, we’d love to have you with us.

This is a volunteer production powered by an incredible community of passionate creatives. What we may lack in budget, we make up for with dedication, professionalism, creativity, and an unforgettable experience. With over 200 creatives involved in the project, this is a fantastic opportunity to gain experience, build your portfolio, network with like-minded people, and become part of something special.

Bring your own tent.
Bring your own post.
apocalyptic,cannibal-style costume if possible.
Meet fellow creatives and filmmakers.
Gain hands on feature film experience.

Can’t make all four days? No problem! Even joining us for a single day is a huge help and greatly appreciated.

Come for the filmmaking, stay for the adventure, the stories, and the community.

If you’d like to be involved, let us know below or send us a message.

See you in the wasteland.

#NESTProject #IndependentFilm #FeatureFilm #Filmmaking #VolunteerActors #FilmCommunity #PostApocalyptic #BehindTheScenes #ChesterFilming

items.text:
Casting Call For Fast Food Brand World Cup Ad
I’m currently looking to cast 4 actors for a promo shoot on Monday 8th June in Central Liverpool. The shoot is for a fast food chain where we will be filming a few videos for their social media pages advertising their new World Cup menu! Payment is £100 flat rate & food from the company will be provided on set too! Please bare in mind actors will be working around/with meat products too.

We’re ideally looking for 2x male & 2x female performers from different cultures & back grounds so we urge everybody to apply! 

To apply please send a recent headshot & showreel (if possible) to leomoorebusiness@gmail.com 

📆 Monday 8th June

⏰ 12-5pm

📍Central Liverpool

💰£100 Flat Rate

topComments.text: Hi, just sent you an email☺️⚽️✌️

items.text:
Actor. Director. Storyteller.

With 20+ years of experience in film, television, theatre, and commercials, I’ve been fortunate to work on projects for Wegovy, Mizuho Bank, NBC Weather App, AOL, MTV, and a variety of award-winning and independent productions.

Currently directing multiple projects while continuing to pursue acting opportunities. Open to quality collaborations in film, television, commercials, digital media, and branded content.

IMDb, reel, headshots, and professional materials are available upon request.

I am happy to discuss availability, scope, and production needs on a case-by-case basis.

#Actor #Director #NYCActor #NJActor #CommercialActor #Casting #FilmMaker #Television #Storyteller

sharedPost.text:
Prosper came from Eastside Watts Bounty Hunters
Nipsey Hussle came from the Westside Rolling 60s.
By every rule—they were never supposed to become brothers.

But sometimes loyalty is stronger than politics.

Real Ones Are Rare: Beyond The Colors is the untold true story of Darnell “Prosper” Conley’s extraordinary journey from Nickerson Gardens to the music industry—and the powerful bond he built with the late Nipsey Hussle long before the world knew his greatness.

Filled with powerful lessons, hidden industry truths, unforgettable encounters, and raw life experiences, this book reveals what happens when authenticity survives pressure, ambition meets purpose, and real recognizes real.

This isn’t gossip.

This isn’t manufactured.

This is legacy.

And once you start reading… you won’t want to put it down.

media.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'A TRUE STORY OF BROTHERHOOD, LOYALTY & LEGACY BEYOND THE COLORS DIFFERENT HOODS. DIFFERENT COLORS. SAME PURPOSE. NICKERSONGARDENS CKERSON GARDENS WATTS BLOOD 知村 ROLLIN 60s CRIP CRIP BY EVERY RULE, WE WERE SUPPOSED TO BECOME BROTHERS. BUT SOMETIMES IS STRONGER THAN POLITICS. THE UNTOLD TRUE STORY BEHIND LEGEND A BROTHERHOOD BUILT ON TRUST, RESPECT & PURPOSE BEHIND THE MUSIC. BEHIND THE MOVEMENT. BEHIND MAN WORLDNEVERKNEW. WORLD NEVER KNEW. ARE RARE BOK THE DARNELL COMING CONLE SOON'

items.groupTitle: Casting For Artists&Dancers Travel All Over The World

items.text:
Most actors will read this and do nothing. That is fine. This is not for them.
I am Freya Tingley. Two Netflix series regular roles. Six feature film leads. Jersey Boys with Clint Eastwood.
Once Upon a Time on ABC.

Started at 14. No connections. No money. No Hollywood family. Signed with a top Hollywood agent by 17. Booked a Netflix series regular at 18, three months after moving to LA.

That is not luck. That is a strategy I can prove works, because I have run it on myself and watched it work on the
actors I have quietly coached for years.
Here is what most actors are doing.

Training, thousands of dollars.
New headshots, hundreds.
Self-tapes, no bookings.
Waiting for agents to call.

Years burned. Bank accounts drained. Confidence destroyed.

Here is what working actors are actually doing.

Optimising for the one specific skill that determines booking rate.
Engineering the conditions for representation to chase them.
Generating their own opportunities when reps go quiet.
Treating their career like a business, not a lottery ticket.

That is the difference. And nobody teaches it.

So I am running 2-hour private 1:1 mentorships over Zoom. Just you and me. Fully tailored to your career stage.

What you get:
• A diagnosis of why you are stuck, specific not generic
• The booking skill audit, will rewire how you audition
• A representation strategy if you do not have an agent
• A re-activation strategy if your agent has gone cold• A self-generated opportunity plan you can run this month
• My exact materials checklist

Outcome: you leave with a written plan. No confusion. No "what now". Just execution.

If you know you are ready, DM me "COMMIT" to apply.

I take a handful of these a month. That is it.

items.text: Æblecremekage Til kagen: 2 æbler, et skåret i små tern og et i tynde skiver 1 spsk sukker 2 æg En knivspids salt 8 g (1 tsk) vaniljesukker 120 g (0,6 kop) sukker 100 ml (1/2 kop) vegetabilsk olie 130 ml (1/2 kop) varm mælk 280 g (1,75 kopper) mel 16 g (2 tsk) bagepulver 50 g rosiner 1 æggeblomme 2 spsk mælk Flourmelis til drys (valgfrit)... Skal lige sige noget for at blive ved med at få mine opskrifter... Tak. Opskrift i den første c.o.m.m.e.n.t

🎭 Du spürst, dass mehr in dir steckt?

Dann ist jetzt dein Moment, es auszuprobieren!
Beim Mini-Workshop entdeckst du, was echtes Schauspieltraining ausmacht – ehrlich, lebendig und ganz ohne Druck.

Live via Zoom, mit echten Übungen und persönlichem Feedback.

📅 MORGEN, den 03. Juni 2026
⏰ ab 18 Uhr
🕞 90-120 Minuten
💻 Online via Zoom
👤 Nur 8 Plätze - noch 2 Plätze frei
💶 Nur 21 EUR
🍀 + Chance auf ein 60-minütiges 1zu1-Coaching mit mir

👉 Jetzt anmelden und dein schauspielerisches Potential entdecken: https//:www.schauspielwerkstatt-berlin.de/mini-workshop

Wir freuen uns auf dich.

TimeToShine ✨

Greetings to all qualified and experienced actors!
We are casting for an exciting movie filming in Mulderdrift, Krugersdorp, from June 22 to June 26, 2026. 

If you're interested, please submit resume, one full-body photo, a headshot, and your showreel to Sanny via whatsApp 078 121 4807

We are eager to fill the following roles:

1. Nthati

items.text:
Hey everyone!

I'm a casting producer for Property Brothers and casting is now OPEN for homeowners with big reno dreams (and maybe a few “what did we get ourselves into?” moments ) in Vancouver!

We’re looking for:
• Homeowners who have **recently purchased a home**
• A minimum renovation budget of **$75K**
• At least **3 rooms** in need of renovation
• Availability for filming in **Fall 2026**

Feel free to apply: [https://www.drewandjonathan.com/casting/](https://www.drewandjonathan.com/casting/)

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.

topComments.text: Hey. Have you ever thought of doing renos for seniors living in mobile homes? Like me, my home is showing signs of old age and can't afford the upkeep or avoiding the scams/overpricing seniors, especially since us baby boomers are living longer too.🤪
Why in the world would anybody do this, so basically it’s a cosmetic renovation that you have to pay at least $75,000 without a say in the outcome. What in the world would you get out of it?

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL:  JESSICA**

**Halfway Pictures is now casting JESSICA, a supernatural horror feature film.**

Paid · Non-Union

Susie — Lead · Female · 27–33
Jacob — Lead · Male · reads as 7
Jessica — Lead · Female · reads as 7
Ken — Supporting · Male · late 50s–mid 60s
Olivia — Supporting · Female · reads as 7
David — Supporting · Male · mid-30s

Submission deadline: June 17, 2026
Auditions: June 20, 2026, 4:00–8:30 PM
Rate: $200/day
Shoot dates: July 1–14, 2026

Airfare and lodging will be provided for selected actors coming from outside Winnipeg, including from the United States.

Submit a recent headshot, resume, and reel if available.

Apply here:
jessicahorrorfilm.com

**Please do not send Facebook messages. Use the contact information on the website.**

topComments.text: Where can we find information about the creatives behind this project? Are you able to provide more information? I rep a lot of child actors but need more information to support your project.

items.text:
Zostań częścią rodziny serialu „Gliniarze”!!!

Do 21. i 22. sezonu serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie 
(i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do ról: 

Policjantów „Mundurowych”

Stawka: 300 - 400 zł netto za dzień 

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe ( w przypadku braku materiałów - wybranym osobom prześlę scenkę castingową do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

WARSZAWA — ZOSTAŃ CZĘŚCIĄ WIDOWNI KULTOWEGO TELETURNIEJU!
Zapraszamy osoby polskojęzyczne w wieku 17–60 lat do udziału w nagraniach programu jako publiczność!

To świetna okazja, by zobaczyć telewizję od kulis, poczuć atmosferę prawdziwego planu zdjęciowego i przeżyć wyjątkową przygodę

Terminy nagrań w czerwcu:

8, 9, 11, 12, 15, 16, 18, 19, 22

Wynagrodzenie: 100 zł gotówką po zakończeniu nagrania

Zgłoszenia: https://forms.gle/WbMaogE36qVvmd4C6

Nie przegap okazji i dołącz do widowni kultowego teleturnieju!

💰 BARDZO ATRAKCYJNA STAWKA ZA 1 DZIEŃ W PROGRAMIE TV! 💰
Nagrania: 20, 21, 22, 23.06 - WARSZAWA 

🌟 OSTATNIE DNI CASTINGU STACJONARNEGO – PROGRAM RANDKOWY „MAGIA NAGOŚCI”! 🌟

items.text:
**TYPE:** Non-union Commercial

**CASTING:** New Yorkers who wear prescription glasses

**LOCATION:** New York, NY

**COMPENSATION: **$700/10hr shoot day + $7500 buyout

**CONTACT:** broadcastcasting@gmail.com or use flyer QR to obtain audition instructions

**TIME(s):** shoot date range 6/2 - 6/5! Submission deadline 5/18, 4pm

**---**

**CASTING CALL** seeking local **NEW YORKERS** to feature in a commercial campaign for a major **EYEWEAR** retail chain shooting out of New York, NY. MUST wear prescription glasses + have a hobbie/job they can passionately speak about! Please see our flyer with the project details or reach out to us at broadcastcasting@gmail.com if you have any questions! **SUBMISSION DEADLINE:** Mon 18th May 2026

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of eyeglasses and text that says 'Lobroad-cast [C] broad-cast COMMERCIAL CASTING LOOKING FOR MEN & WOMEN IN Σ WHO WEAR GLASSES & HAVE A PASSION FOR A SPECIFIC HOBBY OR JOB Examples: Florist, beekeeper, beekeeper,artist,sommelier, artist, sommelier, psychic, curator, food stylist, bird watcher, rock climber, painter, woodworker, ainter,woodworker,jeweler, ,jeweler, ballerina -ANYTHING INTERESING! REQUIREMENTS Must live or work in NYC Must wear glasses Must be available June 2nd June 5th COMPENSATION: $700 per shoot date(s $7500 to cover the use SCAN THE QR CODE FOR THE AUDITION INSTRUCTIONS For more info please reach out to: broadcastcasting@gmail.com WWW.BROAD-CAST.TV'

items.text:
There’s now less than a month until the DISCOUNTED early bird offer for our Colne Picture Show short film festival ends. If you have a short that’s under 30mins long, submit it today!

This festival is not just about showcasing films but also creating a space for the future of cinema. We aim to help bloom the next generation of artists. 

Hosted at the beautiful Little Savoy Cinema on the 14th November, we hope to create an intimate and personable experience for filmmakers new and old. If you or anyone you know has a film to submit, follow the link below!

items.text:
Dear people 👋 there's Director of Bollywood movies 🎥 looking for an investor who is interested to collaborate with him. 

We are making a trilogy film dealing directly with the end of the world—and exploring what happens in its aftermath.

Three Films. Three Stories. All interlinked.

items.text:
Casting Call - MA Final Project
Casting Call: Writer (Lead Role) – Short Film

Shooting dates: 26th – 27th June 2026

Location: West London

Rate: £150/day (negotiable) + £50 night shoot supplement (if applicable) With catering and travel expense 

Contact: 1252273@metfilmstudents.ac.uk

Project: A psychological short film about a writer whose crime‑fiction meta‑narrative blurs with reality. The story follows an unnamed Writer (female-presenting, 20s–30s，Asian) – a calm, detached creator who orchestrates a staged murder in her basement while casually conversing with her “victim”. She is precise, intelligent, and quietly unsettling.

Role: THE WRITER (lead)

Character snapshot:

· Composed, observant, with a dry sense of humour.

· Moves between dreamlike control and sudden vulnerability.

· Speaks in short, deliberate lines (see script excerpts).

· Must be comfortable with psychological tension, light physical staging (rearranging props, wiping floors), and close‑up emotional shifts.

Shooting details:

· Two days (26–27 June) in West London.

· Day interiors 

· £150/day (negotiable based on experience) – plus £50 supplement for any night work.

To apply:

Send a recent headshot, CV/showreel link (or short self‑tape reading the lines below) to 1252273@metfilmstudents.ac.uk. Please put “WRITER CASTING – [Your Name]” in the subject line.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of drink, fragrance and text that says 'NEVER A Psychological Meta- Meta-Thriller hriller Short Film WIN Duration 10-12 min Format English Location London/Hangzhou (China) Bar Genre Psychological Thriller Trimester 3 Final Major Project'

items.text:
🎭 HOW I WENT FROM FROM UNKNOWN TO LEAD ROLES ON NETFLIX
It Seems Like You've Done Everything Right. So How Come Nothing Is Moving?

You trained. You got the headshots. You got the reel. Maybe you even got the agent.
And yet you are sitting here wondering why nothing is moving.

How are you supposed to break into Netflix-level work when nobody actually explains the strategy behind it?

I am Freya Tingley. I’m from Perth. I was 14 when I started. No connections, no Hollywood map. By 17 I had signed with one of the biggest agents in town. At 18 I moved to LA and three months later I was a series regular on a Netflix show. Then Jersey Boys with Clint Eastwood. Then Wendy Darling on ABC's Once Upon a Time.

It looks like luck from the outside. It was not.

What you are not being told is that most of the work happens before the audition room. The actors who book have
figured out how to engineer their own access. The ones who do not are still waiting to be discovered.

I have been getting a lot of messages from actors lately saying things like:

"I have an agent but no auditions."
"I am auditioning but not booking."
"I do not know what I am doing wrong."

What if the problem is not your talent?

What if it is the strategy, or the lack of one?

I run private 2-hour 1:1 mentorships over Zoom. We diagnose where you are stuck, build a custom plan, and you leave knowing exactly what to do next.

I would rather you have clarity than spend another year guessing.

If you know you need to move, DM me "COMMIT" to apply for a session.

What would it cost you to keep doing what you have been doing?

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people

topComments.text: Well I'm shooting independent films and surrounding myself with filmmakers but I rather do that while auditioning so I don't have to worry about not working but would still take u up because I need a big agency and connections to make sure I stay working.

🎭 Female Go-Go Dancers Wanted – Guangdong, Zhanjiang (China)
✨ We are hiring 2 female go-go dancers

📍 Location: Guangdong, Zhanjiang, China

💰 Salary: $1,200 USD/month

💃 Additional earnings:

* 50% commission on table dances

* 50% commission on consummation

* 100% tips

📅 Start Date: ASAP

📄 Contract Duration: 6 months (with possibility of extension)

✅ Benefits Included:

* Flight ticket

* Visa

* Accommodation

* Meals

If interested, please send:

* Recent photos

* Dance videos (if available)

* Nationality and current location

📩 DM for more details.

🎭 Female Go-Go Dancers Wanted – Guangdong, Zhanjiang (China)
✨ We are hiring 2 female go-go dancers

📍 Location: Guangdong, Zhanjiang, China

💰 Salary: $1,200 USD/month

💃 Additional earnings:

* 50% commission on table dances

* 50% commission on consummation

* 100% tips

📅 Start Date: ASAP

📄 Contract Duration: 6 months (with possibility of extension)

✅ Benefits Included:

* Flight ticket

* Visa

* Accommodation

* Meals

If interested, please send:

* Recent photos

* Dance videos (if available)

* Nationality and current location

📩 DM for more details.

items.text:
Napisałam muzykę do filmu 🎥 ale ostatecznie utwór nie został wykorzystany. Jeśli znajdzie się jakaś produkcja do której utwór by pasował - chętnie udostępnię! 
Piszę też muzykę ambientową oraz ilustracyjną oparta na pianinie. Gram również w dwóch projektach, w których skomponować możemy muzykę rockową. Z jednym projektem pojawiliśmy się już w filmie, w drugim projekcie gramy rocka z amerykańskim vibem opartym. Więcej próbek tutaj : —> https://bezdech-records.com/muzyka-do-filmow/

sharedPost.text:
Co dzieje się, gdy klasyczny balet spotyka postapokaliptyczny klimat Mad Maxa? 🏜️✨

W ten wolny czwartek nadrabiam zaległości i premierowo pokazuję Wam utwór, który pierwotnie miał trafić do filmu. Choć projekt nie doszedł do skutku, ta kompozycja to jedno z moich ulubionych dzieci – dlatego ląduje w portfolio i trafia prosto w Wasze ręce (i uszy!).

Muzyka odzwierciedla nietypowy scenariusz: klasyczny taniec, który stopniowo przechodzi w gęsty, intensywny klimat zasilany potężnymi syntezatorami. W wizualizacji postawiłam na bezkres pustyni – to miks moich ożywionych zdjęć z Jordanii (Anna Żmijewska, pamiętasz te widoki? 🇯🇴) oraz moja "ejajowa" wariacja na temat Mad Maxa. Hope You like it!

Wciśnijcie play i dajcie znać, jak Wam się podoba!

🎬 LINK DO YOUTUBE CZEKA W KOMENTARZU! KLIKAJCIE! 🎬

Za pomoc w realizacji dziękuję niezastąpionym:
▪️ Mix & wsparcie: Dxcv3r
▪️ Master: Piotr Buzi Łabuzek

#muzykafilmowa #kompozycjamuzykidofilmu #kompozytoremocji #muzykaobrazowa #innamuzykaobrazowa #pustynnaburza #electromusic #madmaxmusic #soundtrack #cinematicmusic #filmscoring #composerofemotions #imagerymusic #otherimagerymusic #desertstorm #electromusic #madmax #soundtrack

Koniecznie kliknijcie w link na Youtube, który jest w komentarzu!
Holy Høly

Cześć, 

polecacie jakąś szkołe aktorską w Warszawie na rok? 

Warszawskie Studium Aktorskie, jakieś opinie?

Dzięki i pozdrawiam

topComments.text: Szkoła Machulskich. Bardzo intensywne zajęcia, co tydzień po 6h Cena przystępna. Jeszcze jest Szkoła Bogusława Lindy ale drogo i tylko raz w miesiącu chyba nie wiem opinii też nie znam

Cześć! Od Września ruszają moje autorskie warsztaty pracy aktorskiej w małych grupach w Białołęckim Ośrodku Kultury. Będziemy pracować nad wszystkimi niezbędnymi aspektami. Sama jestem aktorką zawodową, mocno zaangażowaną w pracę instruktorską i mogę się pochwalić. Zapraszam! Polecam

sharedPost.text:
💲 FOR SALE: 

ARRI M90 9K HMI High-Speed Kit - $10k

Includes everything on cart:
1x M90 HMI Head, 15 to 49° Focusing
     - 137 hours on head & one globe
1x EB MAX 6/9 Ballast
1x 4-Way Barndoors
2 x Head Cable: 50'
2x Osram HMI Digital 9000W Lamp
     - 1 used but in good condition, 1 entirely unused
1x Flight Case

All together goes for over $45k brand new

The light will be shipped via Southwest air cargo in a large Aputure rolling case, which is included with purchase.

Can provide more details if you message us - or available for local pickup. 

DM for more info, we’re happy to take videos or video call to show details!

items.text:
Making you look as if you’re supposed to be in the role.

I specialise in expression-led, casting-ready headshots that read clearly on Spotlight and other casting platforms.

Most of my sessions are shot indoors in a more controlled and comfortable environment, whatever the weather decides to do outside.

If you want to work in the comfort of your home (or a place near you), I can come with the studio to you. If you don't mind travelling, you're welcome in my studio in Grantham, Lincolnshire.

Feel free to reach out via DM or via:

https://www.CaptivatingHeadshots.co.uk

items.text:
Most people will watch this reel and think…

“That looks terrifying.”

They’re right.

That’s exactly why you should do it.

One weekend. One microphone. One chance to prove to yourself you’re capable of more than you think.

Stand-up comedy isn’t instant talent.

It’s technique.

And you’ll learn it from multi-award-winning comedian Jed Salisbury before performing live in front of an audience.

People travel from all over the UK for this.

Your turn? 🎤

🎟️ https://buy.stripe.com/14A28r5bs5pZ5aw0oi4gg0y

#StandUpComedy #YorkshireEvents #ConfidenceBuilding #ChallengeYourself #LiveComedy

items.summary:
Most people will watch this reel and think…

“That looks terrifying.”

They’re right.

That’s exactly why you should do it.

One weekend. One microphone. One chance to prove to yourself you’re capable of more than you think.

Stand-up comedy isn’t instant talent.

It’s technique.

And you’ll learn it from multi-award-winning comedian Jed Salisbury before performing live in front of an audience.

People travel from all over the UK for this.

Your turn? 🎤

🎟️ https://buy.stripe.com/14A28r5bs5pZ5aw0oi4gg0y

#StandUpComedy #YorkshireEvents #ConfidenceBuilding #ChallengeYourself #LiveComedy

items.groupTitle: Casting Calls & Acting Auditions in London / UK
items.title: (no title)

items.text:
Casting call for MA Final Project
The shoot covers travel expenses and meals. We are looking for actors with performance experience and welcome everyone to apply.

A self-tape and audition are required. Thank you for your cooperation. 

CASTING CALL

PSYCHOLOGICAL THRILLER SHORT FILM

MetFilm School Student Production

We are casting for a psychological thriller short film exploring the relationship between fiction, crime, and authorship. The project features a contained cast, strong dialogue, and character-driven performances.

Roles

• A – Maintenance Worker (Male, 25–45)

An ordinary blue-collar worker whose reality begins to unravel. Naturalistic performance required.

• B – Criminal (Male, 30–35)

Calm, meticulous, and unsettling. Requires subtle psychological depth.

• Writer / Author (Female, 20–30，Asian Feature）

Intelligent, composed, and enigmatic. Strong screen presence required.

Project Information

Genre: Psychological Thriller / Mystery

Format: Short Film

Language: English

Location: London, United Kingdom

Shooting Dates: 26–27 June 2026

Compensation

£150–£200 per shooting day (negotiable depending on experience and role).

Submission Requirements

• Headshot

• Acting CV (if available)

• Showreel or self-tape (if available)

• Preferred role(s)

Contact

1252273@metfilmstudents.ac.uk

items.title: Casting call for MA Final Project

items.text:
A well-known cycling company is looking for a few enthusiastic and confident cyclists to participate in a shoot on 23rd of June in central London. 

We'll be capturing staged shots and some motion of a few commuters cycling through a London park and we'd love to feature a couple of diverse, confident riders. As part of this shoot, we will also be taking some close up expressive portrait shots to show the joy of cycling. 

Time: 10am - 4pm (flexible) 
Style: Modern city professional, clean but natural. 
Fee: Travel costs, subsistence and £50 for the day

Requirements: You must be able to confidently ride on cycle paths and roads, be able to travel to a London park (location TBC but will be central) and ideally have your own helmet. 

If interested, please email lily@themtmagency.com with:

A quick intro,
A headshot and (if possible) a big smiling selfie (to show us how expressive you can be) 

Please note, as we are working to a tight turnaround, quick responses are appreciated.

topComments.text: £50 ? on your bike. This is a casting call page where Professionals find work.
Sent 2 emails from me and my partner

sharedPost.text:
Having so much fun on Thursdays! This might look a bit tricky if you've never danced before but I promise you this is a BEGINNERS class! Completely welcoming, completely aimed at "Come and have a go!!" We dance because we enjoy it, because it's good for us. Not for perfection. 👌 And you'll get a great workout in the process. Come and find your new favourite thing to do! These guys are 3 sessions in and haven't looked back.

#danceliverpool #adultclass #trysomethingnew #britneyspears #MoveMore

items.text:
🌟 AUDITION NOTICE – DICK WHITTINGTON 🌟
Dreamworld Entertainments, in association with the Gladstone Theatre, are on the lookout for talented performers to join this year’s magical production of Dick Whittington! 🎭✨

We’re seeking triple-threat male and female performers for principal roles, as well as a talented Cat (strong singer with acro skills preferred) and Fairy.

🎤 Strong acting and vocal ability required

💃 Excellent movement skills essential

🎶 Prepare two contrasting songs

📄 Successful applicants will be sent audition sides

📍 Auditions will take place at the Gladstone Theatre, Port Sunlight

📅 Performers must be available from 27th November – 31st December and have a Liverpool base.

To register your interest, send your CV, Spotlight link/showreel and relevant details to:

📧 dreamworldprincesses@yahoo.co.uk

⏰ Registration closes Friday 12th June. Please note that auditions are by registration only.

We can’t wait to discover the stars of our 2025 pantomime adventure! ⭐🐱👠

#DickWhittington #Auditions #CastingCall #Pantomime #LiverpoolTheatre #MusicalTheatre #TripleThreatPerformer #ActingJobs #TheatreAuditions #GladstoneTheatre #DreamworldEntertainments

Must be available 27th Nov to 31st Dec and have Liverpool base. Auditions will be held at the Gladstone Theatre in Port Sunlight in June. Email dreamworldprincsses@yaho.co.u yahoo.co.uk to register by Friday 12th June. Please do not turn up if you have not registered.'

Casting zdalny do najnowszego odcinka Trudne Sprawy.
Zdjęcia odbędą się w terminach między 21 a 25 czerwca.

1. Główna rola Klara około 22 lat.
Proszę tylko osoby z bogatym doświadczeniem na planie.
Terminy zdjęć:
23,24,25 czerwca.

2. Michał około 24 lat.
Terminy zdjęć:
23,24,25 czerwca.
Serialowy chłopak Klary.
Proszę tylko osoby z bogatym doświadczeniem na planie.

3. Bartosz około 36 lat.
Terminy zdjęć:
21,22,23 czerwca.
Proszę tylko osoby z bogatym doświadczeniem na planie.

4. Mateusz około 32 lat.
Musi mieć aparycję opalonego bruneta.
Terminy zdjęć 21 oraz 23 czerwca.

5. Irena około 58 lat.
Terminy zdjęć 21,22 czerwca. 
Proszę tylko osoby z Wrocławia lub okolic 

6.Grażyna około 52 lat 
Terminy zdjęć 21 czerwiec 
Proszę tylko osoby z Wrocławia lub okolic

7. Jacek około 24 lat 
Terminy zdjęć 23,24,25 czerwca.

8.Jagoda około 45 lat 
Terminy zdjęć 24 czerwiec 
Proszę tylko osoby z Wrocławia lub okolic

9 Miłosz około 23 lata 
Terminy zdjęć 25 czerwiec 
Proszę tylko osoby z Wrocławia lub okolic.

Zainteresowane osoby chcące poznać szczegóły oferty. Czyli opis postaci, historia oraz wynagrodzenie proszone są
Zostawić koment. Pod postem.
Lub na emial 
adrian.zarzecki@polotmedia.pl 
Z informacją wiek, z jakiego miasta, jakie doświadczenie na planie. Zdjęcie oraz numer tel.

Wynagrodzenie płatne gotówką na planie.
Dla osób spoza Wrocławia gwarantuje hotel po stronie firmy.
Zapraszam na plan zdjęciowy :)

items.text:
🎟 Looking for one of the best things to do in Spokane on Saturday, June 13th? 🎟 Use this special code **DDSWA** 

www.thedinnerdetective.com/spokane

The Dinner Detective combines dinner, comedy, mystery, and audience participation into one unforgettable evening. The actors are hidden throughout the crowd, making every guest part of the experience.

Perfect for couples, friend groups, celebrations, and team outings.

Reserve your seats and see if you can solve the mystery.

🎟️ Use Code to save on June 13th: DDSWA
🚨 Spokane's most wanted event is back!

If you're searching for something beyond the typical dinner date, The Dinner Detective delivers an unforgettable night of mystery, comedy, and audience interaction.

items.text:
CASTING CALL
A non-union Black sapphic narrative short film about loss, love, and the rich cultural spiritual traditions that process it all.

Shoots in Detroit, late summer 2026, tentative Spring 2027

LEAD — CANEISHA, mid-40s to 50s, Black masc-presenting/stud/androgynous. Grief-stricken, but warm and entertaining before losing the love of her life.

LEAD — LOVIE, late 40s to 50s, Black, dark-skinned or medium-brown, femme-presenting, free-spirited and goofy, with a classic case of eldest sister syndrome that still resides in her. 

SUPPORTING — AFENI, mid-40s to 50s, Black, medium-brown or dark-skinned, masc-presenting, tender best friend, kind of a hippie. 

SUPPORTING — AZRAELIA, mid-30s to mid-40s, dark-skinned Black woman, witty younger sister, ambitious and trendy businesswoman. Ideally full-figured.

SUPPORTING — PAPA MONTGOMERY - late 70s to 90s, Black, if y'all don't get y'all grandfather involved in a film. Playful and lively. 

COMPENSATION: This is a microbudget project. Currently we can guarantee profit shares from the film, but we are working on honorariums for each principal role. We're also working on funding to hopefully assist with travel or lodging for non-locals.

HOW TO APPLY:

Submit a good quality photo, resume, age, a reel if you have one and interest to freedomdrumfilm@gmail.com and casting director MacKenzie Galloway at mackenziegallowayllc@gmail.com. Sides will be sent upon receipt. Supplemental dramatic and comedic monologues are welcome. 

Stay involved with the project @freedomdrumfilm.

View the casting call on Instagram and Backstage: 

https://www.instagram.com/p/DX6qXEEDmME/?igsh=Z2g4aWNkMmF3dDE3

https://www.backstage.com/casting/freedom-drum-3147338/

items.text:
**JOB:** Web Series — Recurring Host Role 

**CASTING:** Open gender, 25-45, strong on camera presence **LOCATION:** Long Beach, California, USA 

**COMPENSATION:** Paid — $1,000 per shoot day, rate open to discussion as series develops 

**CONTACT:** chloe@muhameds.com 

**TIME(S):** Accepting submissions now, production ongoing

Non-union. Seeking a host for a short form branded web series for a wellness and performance drink company shooting at a professional sound stage in Long Beach.

The character is knowledgeable, worldly, and genuinely curious — someone who's done the research and can't stop talking about what they found. Think less polished spokesperson, more fascinating person you met at a dinner party who happens to know everything about the history of medicinal mushrooms and isn't weird about it. Each episode covers a single functional ingredient — its origins, the science, why it matters. Scripts are provided but the right person will make them feel completely natural and uncontrived.

Background or genuine personal interest in health, wellness, nutrition, herbalism, biohacking, or related fields is a real advantage — the content will reward someone who actually finds this stuff interesting.

You are not: a supplement bro or a wellness influencer.

To apply send a short self tape video introducing yourself and why this sounds like your kind of thing. No formal reel required — just show us who you are.

⚽ PILNY CASTING DO SERIALU „FORWARD” ⚽

Szukamy aktorów i aktorek mieszkających w Warszawie lub okolicach do anglojęzycznego serialu sportowego „FORWARD”.

📍 Zdjęcia: Warszawa
📅 Okres zdjęciowy: 15–24 czerwca
🎬 8 dni zdjęciowych

Poszukujemy osób swobodnie mówiących po angielsku, gotowych przesłać krótkie self-introduction w języku angielskim oraz dostępnych w terminach wskazanych przy rolach.

Wśród ról znajdują się m.in.:
• fanki drużyny piłkarskiej,
• dziennikarz sportowy,
• piłkarze,
• lekarze,
• inwestor Mr. Jones.

Wszystkie role posiadają kwestie dialogowe w języku angielskim.

Jeśli jesteś zainteresowany/a udziałem w projekcie, wyślij proszę wiadomość prywatną wraz ze swoim zgłoszeniem.

Czekam na Wasze wiadomości!

Irina
Casting Director

items.text:
**CASTING CALL! **We are looking for leading cast roles in commutable distance to Portsmouth for our annual pantomime - this year is Pinocchio! Produced in-house and performed alongside a cast of local child actors, this year's production aims to be the most fun and accessible panto in Portsmouth! 

 

**Details of roles, dates and auditions: **[https://www.groundlings.co.uk/pinocchio-casting](https://www.groundlings.co.uk/pinocchio-casting)

 

We're a community led theatre and as such cast members will be expected to work alongside young people, children and our volunteers - and look to have fun in the process!

 

For consideration, please submit a self tape including requested audition scenes and songs on the link above, indicating the specific role you’re applying for by 18 June 2026 to casting@groundlings.co.uk

See link in our post to find out more! Groundlings ndlingsTheatre,Portsmouth Theatre, Groundlings THIATH'

🐈‍⬛💰WEŹ UDZIAŁ W IDŹ NA CAŁOŚĆ
Szukamy ludzi z każdego zakątka Polski, którzy:

• Mają ogromny dystans do siebie i kochają dobrą zabawę 🤡

• Są kontaktowi, głośni i pełni pozytywnej energii ⚡

• Nie boją się zaryzykować dla wielkich wygranych!

•Mile widziane zgłoszenia z rodziną, grupą znajomych. 

🔥 DLACZEGO WARTO?

• Pula nagród rozbija bank: Samochody, luksusowe wycieczki zagraniczne, markowe prezenty i gotówka! 🚗✈️💰

• Gwarantowana kasa: Każdy uczestnik otrzymuje 120 zł netto za samo przybycie do studia!

•🎬Rywalizujesz tylko z osobami w studio, nie ma quizów, testów wiedzy, szanse większe niż w Lotto ! 

• Przygoda życia: Poczuj magię telewizji w profesjonalnym studio.

📅 SZCZEGÓŁY:

• Kiedy: Czerwiec i Lipiec (dogadamy z Tobą konkretny termin!)

• Gdzie: Warszawa (Szeligi, Transcolor Studio,Szeligowska 48) – dojazd we własnym zakresie.

• Dla kogo: Każdy 18+ Nie musisz mieć żadnego doświadczenia przed kamerą!

📩 JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?

Napisz do nas  e-mail: PAULINA@SCENERIA.COM.PL

Tytuł: TELETURNIEJ

W treści: Imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + Twoje aktualne zdjęcie.

items.text:
Actors don’t just sell talent.

They sell energy.

The way you approach a self-tape, an audition, a room, or even an email sends a message long before your performance does. Positive energy travels. People feel it. And people want to work with people who make them feel good.

Your energy is part of your casting.

🔗 linktr.ee/mattzina

#ActingTips #ActorsLife #SelfTapeSuccess #ActingCareer #MattZina

items.summary:
Actors don’t just sell talent.

They sell energy.

The way you approach a self-tape, an audition, a room, or even an email sends a message long before your performance does. Positive energy travels. People feel it. And people want to work with people who make them feel good.

Your energy is part of your casting.

🔗 linktr.ee/mattzina

#ActingTips #ActorsLife #SelfTapeSuccess #ActingCareer #MattZina
items.title: Actors don’t just sell talent.

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 23/2026

FANTASY, HORROR,  DEMENZ UND EIN KAMERAMANN 

Köpfe werden rollen. Sechsundzwanzig Jahre nach ihrer ersten Begegnung mit einem maskierten Täter geraten die verbliebenen Mitglieder der damaligen Gruppe erneut in Lebensgefahr und setzen dabei einen Angriff auf ihre Lachmuskeln in SCARY MOVIE.

Der Auserwählte ist zurück.Regisseur Travis Knight bringt das legendäre Franchise MASTERS OF THE UNIVERSE  in dem gleichnamigen epischen Live-Action-Abenteuer zurück auf die große Leinwand. 

Eine berührende Geschichte über Liebe und Freundschaft, über Vergessen und Erinnern, über das Älterwerden und Jungbleiben präsentiert Sarah Fuchs mit DER VERLORENE MANN. 

Matthias Pötsch ist ein österreichischer Kameramann und Bildgestalter (Director of Photography), der in Wien lebt. Er absolvierte sein Kamerastudium an der renommierten Filmakademie Wien unter anderem bei Wolfgang Thaler und Michael Haneke. Was er alles zu erzählen hat, bei uns in einem grossen Interview. 

Abgerundet wird das einstündige Magazin mit Songs aus Filmen der letzten 80 Jahre.

Mittwoch 3.6.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

**Now Staffing: **Elite Event Pros is looking to hire males for an upcoming medical conference in **Aurora**!

**Event Details: ASE 2026**
*Gaylord Rockies Resort & Convention Center*
* June 26: 11:30am-6pm
* June 27: 9am-5:30pm
* June 28: 8:30am-2pm

**Rate: **$225/day with up to $30/day reimbursed for parking or rideshare

**Role Description:** Ultrasound model - client will be scanning the chest, abdomen, arms and legs. Because there are chest scans, our client has requested males.

**Dress Code:** gym attire

**To Apply:** Please email a recent picture to Staffing@EliteEventPros.com

Make sure include ASE in the subject.

Thank you!

items.text:
Title: Call Center

Genre: Comedy / Drama

Logline: Four friends — Kenneth, Nick, Tanisha, and Keisha — navigate the politics, chaos, and absurdity of working in a call center while questioning the rules of life to pass the time. Each member of the group is chasing personal goals while on the clock. Beneath the comedy, Kenneth privately battles personified versions of his Depression and Anxiety as they interact with him during difficult moments.

**CALL CENTER SUBMISSION - [ROLE NAME] - [YOUR NAME]**

Please include:
1. Headshot
2. Resume or acting experience
3. Reel, if available
4. Preferred role
5. Current city/location
6. Availability for the 2nd and 3rd weekends of July
7. Self-tape link or video attachment, if sides are provided

 

Roles:

1.      **Keisha: Female, 30-45. Black or Hispanic/Latina.**

Headstrong, sharp-tongued, stylish, and not afraid to curse someone out when necessary. Keisha designs clothes, accessories, and trinkets that she sells to local mom-and-pop stores. Her long-term goal is to become a successful designer whose work is sold in major department store chains.

**Tone:** Bold, funny, confident, protective, blunt.

2.      **Tanisha**: **Female, 30-45. Hispanic, White, mixed race, or ethnically ambiguous. Bisexual.**The group’s marijuana connoisseur and experimental cannabis creative. Tanisha is passionate about growing her own strains, engineering unique blunts, and making gummies. Her dream is to compete in and win local marijuana competitions. She is quirky, unpredictable, emotionally expressive, and deeply committed to her craft.

**Tone:** Chaotic, funny, expressive, strange in the best way, highly animated.

 

3.      **Aaron**: **Male, 25-35. Any ethnicity.**

The department brown-noser. Aaron is always trying to impress management, climb the corporate ladder, and make himself look more important than he is. He has a long-running beef with Kenneth and enjoys trying to get under his skin.

**Tone:** Corporate suck-up, petty rival, passive-aggressive, self-important.

 

4.      **Derek**: **Male, 30-50. Any ethnicity.**

The department manager. Derek is positive, supportive, and genuinely wants his team to succeed. He tries to keep the department moving forward while managing strong personalities, office politics, and workplace chaos.

**Tone:** Supportive manager, patient, professional, quietly funny.

 

5.      **Depression**: **Age 25-40. Any gender. Any ethnicity.**

A personified version of Kenneth’s depression. Depression is strangely upbeat and excited while delivering negative thoughts, self-doubt, and emotional pressure. This character should feel charming, unsettling, and emotionally dangerous without becoming cartoonish.

**Tone:** Cheerful menace, darkly funny, manipulative, emotionally sharp.

 

6.      **Anxiety**: **Age 25-40. Any gender. Any ethnicity.**

A personified version of Kenneth’s anxiety. Anxiety is panicky, restless, and constantly processing too many thoughts at once. They bounce between positive and negative possibilities while trying to calm both Kenneth and themselves down.

**Tone:** Erratic, nervous, fast-thinking, emotionally overwhelmed, sympathetic.

 

Production Company: Ch1-R0n1n productions

Production Type: Indie Web Series

Contact Information: mcgeebrian8@gmail.com

Run Time: Short (23 minutes)

Compensation: Paid. $100 flat rate per role for two shooting days.

Union Status: Non-Union

Audition Information: Callback(s) within three weeks.  

Shooting Schedule: Planning for the 2nd-3rd weekend of July. 2 day 10 hour shoot.

Filming Location: Greenwood Village, Co

Project Description: *Call Center* is an adult workplace comedy-drama about four friends surviving the politics, gossip, frustrations, and absurd conversations of life inside a corporate call center. While taking calls and navigating management drama, the group works on their personal goals, side hustles, relationships, and dreams while questioning the strange rules of adulthood. Beneath the comedy, the story follows Kenneth as he privately battles personified versions of Depression and Anxiety, giving the series an emotional inner-world contrast to the chaos of the office.

**Content Notes:** Adult language, sexual humor, cannabis references, workplace conflict, and mental health themes including depression, anxiety, and suicidal ideation.

items.text:
TITLE: LAST DEBT

GENRE:
Drama / Thriller

LOGLINE:
A dangerous confrontation between two women reveals betrayal, deception, and a deadly secret that neither can escape.

ROLE:
GABY

• Female
• Age 25–40
• Hard of Hearing preferred
• Fluent in American Sign Language (ASL)
• Must be able to communicate in both ASL and spoken English
• Distinctive appearance preferred
• Strong dramatic acting ability required

Character Description:
Gaby is a complex and emotionally layered woman who appears vulnerable and trustworthy but is deeply involved in a dangerous world of deception, manipulation, and survival. The role requires emotional depth, expressive facial acting, and the ability to perform intense dramatic scenes.

PRODUCTION COMPANY:
Quiet Mile Pictures

Writer:
Martina Bell

Director:
Nicki Runge

Producer:
Martina Bell and Nicki Runge

PRODUCTION TYPE:
Independent Short Film (Non-Union)

RUN TIME:
Short Film (Approximately 5–10 minutes)

COMPENSATION:
Paid

UNION STATUS:
Non-Union

AUDITION INFORMATION:
Initial submission requires:
• Headshot
• Resume
• Demo Reel (if available)

Selected actors will be contacted to submit a self-taped audition.

Submission Deadline:
June 20, 2026

SHOOTING SCHEDULE:
Principal Photography:
July 16–17, 2026

Two-day shoot schedule.

Rehearsal dates to be scheduled with selected cast.

FILMING LOCATION:
Denver, Colorado

CONTACT INFORMATION:
Email: [audition@qmpictures.com](mailto:audition@qmpictures.com)

PROJECT DESCRIPTION:
Quiet Mile Pictures is seeking an actress for the role of Gaby in the upcoming short film Last Debt. We welcome submissions from Deaf, Hard of Hearing, and hearing performers who meet the role requirements. This is a character-driven dramatic thriller with strong emotional performances and limited locations, making it an excellent opportunity for actors seeking substantial screen time in a lead supporting role.

items.text:
GRAVE STAKES — OPEN CASTING CALL

Hey everyone! My name is Paul Dächert, I’m a Bachelor directing student at SAE Institute Munich, and I’m currently casting for my thesis film — and I’d love for you to be part of it.

THE FILM

Grave Stakes is a stylized Western dramedy set in a surreal frontier world where death is not an end, but a negotiation. A dying man embarks on a final journey back to his hometown with one goal: to take control over how his life ends. Along the way, a reluctant Death-in-training, a cynical grave digger, and a sharp-witted outlaw woman join him on a road that blends dark humor with existential depth.

Can we truly control how our story ends — or is that the one thing we must learn to let go?

📍 Munich, Germany · 🎬 Sep 10–13, 2026 · 🗣 Filmed in English
💰 No budget · Full catering on set · Showreel footage · Festival submission

THE ROLES

We are currently casting the following five roles:

🤠 Will O’Die — Lead
Male · 30–50 · Black / Afro-descendant
A man at the edge of his life. Dry-witted, quietly stubborn, and carrying both dark humor and real emotional weight. His journey isn’t about survival — it’s about authorship.

🌵 Gloria Sorrow — Lead
Woman · 22–32 · All backgrounds welcome
The sharpest person in every room. Self-possessed, funny, with real warmth underneath the armor. The film never comments on her being a woman. By the end, she’s Sheriff.

💀 Ashford Reaper — Supporting Lead
Open · 25–45 · All backgrounds welcome · ⚠️ British accent essential
Death. In training. Charming, earnest, and reliably incompetent in the most endearing way. The most human character in the film — and the funniest.

🃏 Quinn Alistor — Supporting
Open · 35–55 · All backgrounds welcome
A loveable rogue who would pickpocket Death himself. Runs on charm and self-interest — mostly. Somewhere underneath is one genuine act of kindness that matters more than he’d ever admit.

✝️ The Priest — Supporting
Open · 40–65 · All backgrounds welcome
Rides in unannounced, finds a practice funeral in progress, and steps up to officiate without missing a beat. One scene. One speech. The whole film hinges on it.

HOW TO APPLY

📅 Deadline: July 10, 2026
📩 dachertpaul@gmail.com

Please send:
→ A ~1 minute video in English: your name, age, location, and why a specific role speaks to you
→ A headshot
→ CV & showreel welcome, but not required

Fluent English required. Native speaker preferred — but what matters most is that you feel at home in the language.

We are committed to inclusive casting and warmly encourage actors from all backgrounds to apply. All experience levels welcome. Presence and truth over credits. ❤️

#GraveStakes #CastingCall #ShortFilm #StudentFilm #SAEMunich #OpenCall #CastingGermany #ActorsOfInstagram #WesternFilm #FilmMunich

Für unseren Low-Budget Kinofilm „Unter Erfolg“ (AT) sind wir derzeit auf der Suche nach Komparsen aus Berlin und Umgebung. 

Drehzeitraum: 13.07. - 21.08.2026

Alter: 18 bis 55 Jahre

Geschlecht: w/m/d

Wohnort: Berlin und Umgebung

Gage: unbezahlt

Wichtig: Du musst nicht in dem gesamten Drehzeitraum verfügbar sein. Wir planen dich nach deiner Verfügbarkeit ein.

LOGLINE: Zwischen einem dominanten Trainer, der ihn zu formen versucht, und einer jungen Frau, die ihm eine andere Welt zeigt, steht ein junger Tischtennisspieler vor der Entscheidung: weiter funktionieren - oder endlich fühlen.

Meld dich gerne mit deinen Sperrterminen und einem Portrait bei untererfolg@gmail.com mit dem Betreff „Komparsen“.

Wir freuen uns auf dich!

items.text:
CASTING CALL — CASTRATO

Seeking London-based actors for a psychological horror proof of concept set within a 1970s boys’ choir conservatoire.

“The beauty of a choirboy’s voice lies in its transience.”

We are currently casting the roles of:

• Peter (Male, 8–11)

• Albert (Male, 10–14)

• Michel-Cesar (Male, 40–60)

• Nurse Valentina (Female, 35–60)

Shooting in London • 1 day shoot • 13–14 June

Please see poster for full details.

To apply:

castratofilm@gmail.com

items.text:
**ACCENT SEARCH! Regional LEEDS YORKSHIRE accent needed for actors accent breakdown! Native accents only please!**

Is this you? Are you willing to offer around 2 hours of time to help drama students create a northern accent breakdown for their next project? If so please get in touch asap!

This is an unpaid job but will be a chance to build your network with students from the Oxford School of Drama and an opportunity to skill share.

What will be required of you: voice recordings from provided scripts, 10 min interview, collaborative openness.

Thank you for your time 😊

topComments.text:
NORTH LONDON and HERTFORDSHIRE AREAS
Science Boffins is currently looking for more phenomenal Science Boffins to help us to bring science to life for primary school children. We have parties, schools and events throughout the year.
You don't need a formal background in science as we teach you everything you'll need to know.

All you need is access to a car (unless London based), the ability to work some weekends/weekdays and the desire to launch rockets, concoct potions and generally share just how much fun science can be.

HOW DOES BEING A SCIENCE BOFFIN WORK?

For the right person, this could be the most fun way of making an extra income.

You'll get to enjoy inspiring and educating children, having a fantastic time and getting paid along the way. You'll travel to an event in your local area and bring science to life for primary school age children with some brilliant science experiments.

Are you a fun, enthusiastic and reliable person and able to communicate effectively and promptly to potential bookings? Then join a nationwide team of 40+ well-paid Science Boffin presenters.  We have a strong reputation, rave reviews, and the privilege of working with some globally recognised companies.

We're a friendly bunch and have a (we think!) cracking training program to help you get up to speed. If that sounds like you? You too can become one of our amazing Science Boffins and bring science alive to children.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Annette
Science Boffins

items.text:
San Fernando Valley Parking Lot Available for Filming / Basecamp

Looking to see if there’s any interest from production crews, location managers, or event organizers.

We have a large private parking lot available at 5650 Shoup Ave, Woodland Hills, CA 91367 in the west San Fernando Valley. The lot can accommodate 100+ vehicles and works well for:

* Film & TV basecamp
* Crew parking
* Production staging
* Equipment storage
* Commercial shoots
* Special events

Easy access, plenty of space, and flexible availability depending on the date.

For details, availability, or rates, text Sam at 818-300-3023.

items.text:
*Casting Call!*

We need skilled and talented actors and actresses who are fluent English speakers for these roles:

- *Coach Pascal* (55, male) – University sports coach  
- *Grandmother / Mama Grace* (60s–70s)  
- *Uncle John* (30s)  
- *Tinache’s Mother* (40s) – a real “aunty” type  
- *Minister* (40s) – wedding planner  

Send your profile to Mr. Eddie on 0622634638 to receive an audition script.

*Note:* Submissions close Friday, 5 June. Auditions must be sent by Thursday, 4 June.

Thank you!

📅 10 CZERWCA, Środa
📍WARSZAWA WAWER
💰 Wynagrodzenie: 110 zł płatne gotówką na planie
W przypadku epizodu odpowiednio wyższa stawka

🎬 Do nowego sezonu serialu THE OFFICE PL poszukujemy statystów z Warszawy i okolic  wg poniższego opisu:

PANIE i ❗️PANOWIE ❗️w wieku 25-55 lat
odpowiednio jako:
- zadbani i wytworni goście w hotelowej restauracji. 
❗️Wygląd ludzi biznesu❗️

- kelnerzy i kelnerki w restauracji
- pracownicy recepcji
- obsługa hotelu

Zdjęcia w Hotelu Hilton.
Reżyser wybiera na podstawie zgłoszeń ze zdjęciami. 

Zgłoszenia:
imię, nazwisko, wiek, nr tel., miasto zamieszkania, 2 AKTUALNE ZDJĘCIA: portret oraz sylwetka❗️w stylu biznesowym❗️

items.text:
Zostań częścią rodziny serialu „Gliniarze”!!!

Do 21. i 22. sezonu serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie 
(i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do ról: 

Policjantów „Mundurowych”

Stawka: 300 - 400 zł netto za dzień 

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe ( w przypadku braku materiałów - wybranym osobom prześlę scenkę castingową do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

sharedPost.text:
Having so much fun on Thursdays! This might look a bit tricky if you've never danced before but I promise you this is a BEGINNERS class! Completely welcoming, completely aimed at "Come and have a go!!" We dance because we enjoy it, because it's good for us. Not for perfection. 👌 And you'll get a great workout in the process. Come and find your new favourite thing to do! These guys are 3 sessions in and haven't looked back.

#danceliverpool #adultclass #trysomethingnew #britneyspears #MoveMore

sharedPost.text:
@everyone

CANNIBALS WANTED!

Exciting news, everyone!

We’re looking for volunteers to join us for one of the biggest and most atmospheric sequences in The Eight Saga: N.E.S.T. Project , our Cannibal Camp scenes filming in Chester on the 10th, 11th, 12th, and 13th of June.

Whether you’re an actor, filmmaker, creative, or simply someone who wants to be part of an ambitious independent feature film, we’d love to have you with us.

This is a volunteer production powered by an incredible community of passionate creatives. What we may lack in budget, we make up for with dedication, professionalism, creativity, and an unforgettable experience. With over 200 creatives involved in the project, this is a fantastic opportunity to gain experience, build your portfolio, network with like-minded people, and become part of something special.

Bring your own tent.
Bring your own post.
apocalyptic,cannibal-style costume if possible.
Meet fellow creatives and filmmakers.
Gain hands on feature film experience.

Can’t make all four days? No problem! Even joining us for a single day is a huge help and greatly appreciated.

Come for the filmmaking, stay for the adventure, the stories, and the community.

If you’d like to be involved, let us know below or send us a message.

See you in the wasteland.

#NESTProject #IndependentFilm #FeatureFilm #Filmmaking #VolunteerActors #FilmCommunity #PostApocalyptic #BehindTheScenes #ChesterFilming

Kobiety i mężczyźni do reklamy napoju (statystowanie bez wizerunku).
🔹 Kobiety 22-35 lat
https://casting-app.pl/apply/2855d784b6d04385bf536d3a42ece375
🔹 Mężczyźni 22-35 lat
https://casting-app.pl/apply/a0ad89104c404e209d4f456b6e247f8b
📍 Termin zdjęć: 16 czerwca 
📍 Miejsce: Warszawa 
📍 Charakter zdjęć: dzienne 
💰 Stawka: 150 zł za dzień zdjęciowy - (płatne gotówką po planie) 
📸 Wymagania: zadbani, bez tatuaży 
📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać tylko przez link zamieszczony pod nazwą roli. 
❗ Zgłoszenia na maila nie będą rozpatrywane

EPIZODYŚCI POSZUKIWANI 
Poszukujemy zdolnych Epizodystów Panów w wieku 35-40 do roli prezentera tv w reklamie samochodu

Prosimy o dostępność w dniach 9 i 10 Czerwca (Wtorek i Środa) będzie to jeden dzień zdjęciowy. 

Osoby zainteresowane proszę o wiadomość 
e-mail: na adres statysci@profesjatv.pl  w temacie podajemy: AUTO

Wiadomość powinna zawierać: 
• imię i nazwisko
• wiek 
• aktualne zdajcie twarzy i sylwetki
• link do wizytówki YouTube 
• telefon kontaktowy  

Odezwiemy się do zaproszonych Osób ❗️PROSIMY O PILNE ZGŁOSZENIA ❗️

Stawka 800zł brutto za całość płatne po nagraniu 
Plan realizowany w Warszawie nie zwracamy kosztów za dojazd czy nocleg 

Wysyłając zgłoszenie wyrażają Państwo dobrowolna zgodę na przetwarzanie Danych Osobowych; RODO dla PROFESJA TV 

Pozdrawiamy! 🙂

sharedPost.text:
Bass Setup in Berlin 🎸🇩🇪
Fresh bass setup at Letelier Guitar Setup Berlin.
Every instrument is personally handled by Marcelo Letelier, professional musician, guitarist and guitar tech with 20+ years of experience.
A good bass setup can make a big difference: better action, better intonation, better tuning stability and a more comfortable feel for rehearsals, gigs and recording.
Bass setup service includes:
• Action adjustment
• Intonation
• Truss rod adjustment
• Bridge adjustment
• Fret polish
• Tuning stability check
• Basic electronics check
• General cleaning
If your bass has high action, buzzing, tuning problems or poor intonation, feel free to contact me.
📍Berlin / Neukölln area
🛠 Private workshop by appointment
👤 Setup by Marcelo Letelier
📲 WhatsApp: +49 151 24782561
📩 DM: @letelier.guitar.setup
Bass setup Berlin • Bass repair Berlin • Bass guitar setup Berlin • Guitar setup Berlin • Guitar repair Berlin • Guitar tech Berlin • Luthier Berlin • Bass Wartung Berlin • Gitarren Setup Berlin

items.text:
Für unseren Low-Budget Kinofilm „Unter Erfolg“ (AT) sind wir derzeit auf der Suche nach Komparsen aus Berlin und Umgebung. 

Drehzeitraum: 13.07. - 21.08.2026

Alter: 18 bis 55 Jahre

Geschlecht: w/m/d

Wohnort: Berlin und Umgebung

Gage: unbezahlt

Wichtig: Du musst nicht in dem gesamten Drehzeitraum verfügbar sein. Wir planen dich nach deiner Verfügbarkeit ein.

LOGLINE: Zwischen einem dominanten Trainer, der ihn zu formen versucht, und einer jungen Frau, die ihm eine andere Welt zeigt, steht ein junger Tischtennisspieler vor der Entscheidung: weiter funktionieren - oder endlich fühlen.

Meld dich gerne mit deinen Sperrterminen und einem Portrait bei untererfolg@gmail.com mit dem Betreff „Komparsen“.

Wir freuen uns auf dich!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Wir suchen Komparsen für unseren Low-Budget Kinofilm "Unter Erfolg" (AT) DZR: 13.07.-21.08.2026 Alter: 18-55 Jahre Geschlecht: w/m/d Wohnort Wohnort: Berlin und Umgebung Gage: unbezahlt Bewerbungen an: untererfolg ntererfolg@gmail.com @gmail.com Betreff: f:Komparsen'
